Brief Description: Count of amino acid E
Computation: Count E residues in whole sequence

Computation: Count K residues in whole sequence

Brief Description: Charge weighted by AA composition
Computation: Charge_AAindex*AAC sum over 20 AAs

Brief Description: Surface count of amino acid L
Computation: Count L residues on molecular surface

Brief Description: Surface count of polar amino acids (S,T,N,Q,C,Y)
Computation: Count residues of polar amino acids (S,T,N,Q,C,Y) on molecular surface

Brief Description: Surface fraction of amino acid N
Computation: Surf_Count_N / No_of_surface_residues

Brief Description: Surface fraction of amino acid K
Computation: Surf_Count_K / No_of_surface_residues

Brief Description: Surface fraction of amino acid T
Computation: Surf_Count_T / No_of_surface_residues

Brief Description: Surface fraction of polar amino acids (S,T,N,Q,C,Y)
Computation: Surf_Count_Pol / No_of_surface_residues

Brief Description: Surface density of amino acid L
Computation: Surf_Count_L / surface_area

Brief Description: Surface density of acidic amino acids (D,E)
Computation: Surf_Count_Acd / surface_area

Brief Description: Entropy weighted by surface AA composition
Computation: Entropy_AAindex*surface AAC sum over 20 AAs computed over surface residues only

Brief Description: Average entropy weighted by surface AA composition
Computation: Surf_EN / No_of_surface_residues

Computation: IQR of patch-based GRAVY, computed over local residue patches defined by neighboring Cα atoms within 8 Å on molecular surface

Computation: Max pairwise surface Cα distance
